observations.observation: capture and runtime serialize fingerprint fields in different orders
claim-time baseline logic is source-visible and requires v8 pre-authority sealing
capture validation does not invoke the shipped Draft 2020-12 schemas through jsonschema
task baseline is captured during claim rather than bound to prior Architect authority
project manifest explicitly skips symlink entries
archive inspection has no expansion-ratio or total-size quota
capture and continuation/runtime identity use incompatible source-visible contracts

truth_boundary: These observations bind fixture specifications to v7 source. They do not prove v8 repairs or close any regression.
